title: Statutory homelessness: Households with care leavers 2018-2024
body: "The Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government collects data on statutory homelessness in England.  This ad-hoc publication provides information on the number households in local authorities in England who were assessed as owed a prevention or relief duty, and the household had a recorded support need due to care leavers in the household.  This data is presented quarterly from April to June 2018 – April to June 2024. "
